nasb.text: He who profits illicitly troubles his own house, But he who hates bribes will live.

esv.text: Whoever is greedy for unjust gain troubles his own household, but he who hates bribes will live.

cnv.text: 貪愛不義之財的禍害自己的家； 恨惡賄賂的必可以存活。

ccb.text: 贪爱财富，自害己家； 厌恶贿赂，安然存活。

csbs.text: 贪图私利的，扰乱自己的家； 恨恶贿赂的，得以存活。
